title: Talent Acquisition Partner Germany
required_skills: Full-Life Cycle Recruiting and Hiring processes
5+ years experience in Talent Acquisition or Executive Search
Applicant tracking systems (ATS) and recruitment software
Fluency in German and English (spoken and written)
bonus_skills: Bachelor's degree in Human Resources or Business Administration
matched_skills: Cross-functional team coordination (weak proxy for stakeholder collaboration)
missing_skills: Talent sourcing strategies (active sourcing, talent pools)
5+ years in recruiting or executive search
German language fluency (not evidenced in CV)
core_responsibilities: Manage end-to-end recruitment process from sourcing through onboarding for specialist and leadership roles
Collaborate with hiring managers to define job profiles and develop sourcing strategies
Conduct phone, video, and in-person interviews ensuring a professional candidate experience
Monitor and optimize recruiting KPIs (time-to-hire, time-to-fill, hiring quality, candidate experience)
Contribute to employer branding initiatives and represent the company at career fairs and university programs
recommended_emphasis: Project coordination and stakeholder management experience (Hapag-Lloyd, HSBC PMO)

company_info.size_raw: several thousand employees in Central Europe and many locations in Germany (client company)
